commit.message:
Fix M/S matrix encode: wrong gains caused left-speaker-only + clipping

The M/S encode gains were all set to 1.0, making both Mid and Side
equal to L+R. On decode, R_out = Mid - Side = 0 (silence on right),
L_out = Mid + Side = 4x amplitude (massive clipping).

Correct M/S encode is: Mid = 0.5*L + 0.5*R, Side = 0.5*L - 0.5*R
Fixed msEQ_SideR from +1.0 to -0.5 in both ai-features.js and
pricing-export.js. MidL/MidR/SideL from 1.0 to 0.5.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Add User-Agent header to _fetch_with_retry (MoneyPuck blocks bare urllib)
- Backtest on 2024-25: $1K -> $29.7K, 18.6% ROI, 60.1% win rate

commit.message:
fix(task-state): correct listTaskHistory sorting by completion time (#643)

The listTaskHistory method was sorting by createdAt (creation time),
but the expected behavior is to sort by completion time (most recent
first). This caused test failures when tasks were created and completed
in rapid succession.

Changes:
- Sort by updatedAt (completion time) instead of createdAt
- Add secondary sort by createdAt for stable ordering when updatedAt
  is equal (same millisecond)

Fixes #642

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-authored-by: hs3180 <claude@anthropic.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(accounting): fix account balance Cloud Function batch overwrite bug

The onTransactionWrite Cloud Function had a critical bug where updating
a transaction caused account counters to inflate. The function called
updateAccountBalances() twice on the same batch (reverse then apply),
but the second batch.update() overwrote the first since the read
happened before the batch committed. This lost the reverse operation,
re-adding entry amounts on every transaction update.

Fix replaces read-then-write with atomic FieldValue.increment() and
delta-based calculation for updates. Also fixes recalculateAccountBalances
to filter soft-deleted transactions and use batch chunking.

Adds "Recalculate Account Balances" button to Data Health page to
rebuild all account counters from GL entries after deploying the fix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix Gmail reconnect loop using sessionStorage token cache (#1)

- Add sessionStorage (SS) helper for per-tab token persistence
- Cache Gmail access tokens in sessionStorage (58-min TTL) so page
  refreshes within the same tab no longer require re-authentication
- Restore cached token on app init before falling back to silent OAuth
- Save token to sessionStorage in ensureGoogleToken (both silent and
  interactive paths) and connectGoogleAccount
- Clear sessionStorage on manual disconnect
- Add proactive 5-minute background interval that silently refreshes
  tokens expiring within 10 minutes, keeping long sessions alive

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: replace mock search with real GT search API

- Search queries call GT /search/pools endpoint via proxy
- Instant local filtering from cached pools + debounced API search
- History stored in localStorage (last 5 visited pairs)
- 'Top Tokens' shows real pools sorted by 24h volume
- TokenCard shows price and volume
- Also fixed: search now matches token0 (base) not token1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Remove fork bomb deny rule that breaks settings parser

The :(){ :|:& };: pattern contains empty parens that the
permission parser interprets as a malformed Bash() rule,
causing the entire settings file to be skipped.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(i18n): prevent duplicate sidebar translation keys and stale i18n bleed-through

- translator.js: inject sidebar_key into category index docs (filename ==
  parent folder) during translation, using the folder path relative to
  tutorials/ as a unique key. Prevents Docusaurus "Multiple docs sidebar
  items produce the same translation key" crash when two categories share
  the same translated Japanese label (e.g. ベストプラクティス).
- translator.js: add backfillSidebarKeys() called at end of each run to
  patch sidebar_key into existing translated category docs that predate
  this fix, without requiring a full retranslation.
- fetch-docs-auto.yml / fetch-docs-manual.yml: add rm -rf i18n/ before
  git checkout origin/dev -- i18n/ so master's stale i18n files cannot
  bleed through and overwrite translations committed to dev.

commit.message:
Fix matchmaking: periodic tolerance re-check + add Vercel Analytics

The matching logic only ran on onSnapshot events (doc changes), but
tolerance increases over time without doc changes. Added a 2-second
periodic re-check using cached pool data so players with large win rate
differences (e.g. 100% vs 0%) properly match once tolerance reaches 100%
at ~20 seconds.

Also install @vercel/analytics package added by user.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: rewrite YouTube proxy to use undici + consent cookie

Root cause: node:fetch with HttpsProxyAgent does NOT work correctly
with YouTube's timedtext API. The caption URLs come with ip=0.0.0.0
and return empty content.

Fix: Switch to undici.fetch with ProxyAgent (dispatcher) + SOCS
consent cookie on ALL requests. This is the correct approach that
YouTube actually responds to.

Changes:
- Replace HttpsProxyAgent with undici.ProxyAgent (dispatcher)
- Replace node:fetch with undici.fetch in all YouTube requests
- Add SOCS consent cookie to bypass YouTube consent wall
- Use Platform.shim.fetch for Innertube channel listing
- Change lang priority to pt > pt-BR (pt works better for auto-generated)
- Add t-youtube-transcript-fetcher as fallback dependency

Tested locally: Successfully transcribed video Y00T8a--3gc
(2403 segments, 88050 chars) via Webshare residential proxy.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: ダッシュボード経過時間とストロークインジケータの更新バグを修正

- RecentActivityFeed で useTick を使用して tick を各 ActivityItem に渡す
- createWidgetMemoComparison に thresholdMinutes の比較を追加し、閾値変更が即座にウィジェットに反映されるよう修正

  移除 asyncio.sleep(3) 人工延遲，降低 reply token 逾時風險
- src/services/line_service.py: 移除 WebhookHandler 相關屬性與未使用的 handle_webhook()
- src/services/gemini_service.py: 遷移至 google-genai 新 SDK
  使用原生 async client.aio.models.generate_content() 取代同步 generate_content()

feat: v0.4.0 — agent-grade memory with TODO tracking, export/import, improved dedup

4 new tools (7 → 11 total):
- memory_status: TODO status management (pending → in_progress → done)
- memory_export: JSON backup of all project memories
- memory_import: bulk import from JSON for restore/migration
- memory_cleanup: archive done TODOs, delete stale low-importance memories

Improvements:
- Dedup threshold lowered 0.9 → 0.85 with content-length ratio check
- Session linking: session_id tracked on every stored memory
- Usage analytics: hit_count + last_accessed_at per memory
- Schema auto-migration: existing v0.3.x databases upgrade seamlessly
- memory_init shows TODO status in summary, filters out completed items

18 tests passing (was 14). TypeScript strict. Build clean.
